name: Sales Report - Outstanding Order Balance
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Use the Sales Report - Outstanding Order Balance, to display ALL products "}, {"text": "not fulfilled,", "italic": true}, {"text": " across Processed and Awaiting Payment Orders."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Considerations when using this report:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "the calculation used is: Qty NOT Fulfilled x Unit Price for Processed/Awaiting Payment Orders, separated by Brand"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Products without an associated Brand will display in the results as 'Undefined'"}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "You can create or edit\u00a0Brands to suit your requirements, please see : Settings - Product Attributes."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To access the "}, {"text": "Sales Report - Outstanding Order Balance", "bold": true}, {"text": ", navigate to: "}, {"text": "Reports > Finance Report > Sales Report - Outstanding Order Balance", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppgDFEAY.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppgDFEAY.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "blobid0 (35).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": ""}], "data-id": "n-a"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Special Filters"}], "data-id": "special-filters"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Most of the filtering fields are self explanatory, however see the detailed information below for the more advanced fields."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Inc Tax ", "bold": true}, {"text": "- tick to include tax in the report values"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Country", "bold": true}, {"text": " - if no Country is selected, all countries will be included by default"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "There is no option for date range selection - this report will display values for ALL unfulfilled products\u00a0across\u00a0Awaiting Payment and Processed Order."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Apply filters as required > click "}, {"text": "Search.", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphnWEAQ.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphnWEAQ.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "blobid1 (23).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can view this report in-page, however due to it's extensive nature we recommend you Export to Excel."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Ensure to scroll to the right to view more column detail."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Want more information?
